heading: Nondisclosure of information
label: 40306 Nondisclosure of information
text: Information and documents (other than an agreement) filed with the Federal Maritime Commission under this chapter are exempt from disclosure under and may not be made public except as may be relevant to an administrative or judicial proceeding. This section does not prevent disclosure to either House of Congress or to a duly authorized committee or subcommittee of Congress.section 552 of title 5
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)4030646 App.:1705(j)., , .Pub. L. 98–237, § 6(j)98 Stat. 73Mar. 20, 1984The words “judicial proceeding” are substituted for “judicial action or proceeding” to eliminate unnecessary words.
